# PERF-109 positive: fmt.Sprintf called twice in a loop for a map key
lang: go
file: PERF-109-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func Counts(items []int) map[string]int {
	out := make(map[string]int)
	for _, item := range items {
		key := fmt.Sprintf("k=%d", item)
		out[key]++
	}
	return out
}
